title: Eva Characters on Evageeks
wikitext:
[]: Eva Characters on Evageeks Post by KingXanaduu » Fri Apr 26, 2013 9:38 pm Since this site is catered to everything that is and isn't Evangelion, how do you guys think the characters would react if they found this site? Let's say that the characters, like Shinji, Rei, Asuka, Misato, etc., all joined the site, but didn't reveal themselves. What do you think they would do on this site? Where would they mostly hang out? What would they post about? Who would they talk to and antagonize on the forum, and who would antagonize them? What kind of Wacky adventures do you'd think we'd all have with them?

[]: Post by riffraff11235 » Fri Apr 26, 2013 9:54 pm Well for starters, I think their reaction to (some of) the Image thread would be something like this: SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by Madonna » Fri Apr 26, 2013 9:56 pm Kaji would probably make a thread about watermelons.

[]: Post by Stryker » Fri Apr 26, 2013 9:58 pm I always had the thought of assigning people (if they wanted to, of course) to roleplay as characters in the forum. It would be interesting how they'd turn out.

[]: Post by riffraff11235 » Fri Apr 26, 2013 10:01 pm Madonna wrote: Kaji would probably make a thread about watermelons.

[]: Post by Chuckman » Fri Apr 26, 2013 10:04 pm riffraff11235 wrote: Well for starters, I think their reaction to (some of) the Image thread would be something like this: SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by Madonna » Fri Apr 26, 2013 10:15 pm riffraff11235 wrote: Would his custom title be "Melon Lord"?

[]: Post by Dovah » Fri Apr 26, 2013 10:59 pm I'd hate to see Asuka's reaction when she stumbles upon the "Angel sex" thread.

[]: Post by Catamari » Sat Apr 27, 2013 12:04 am All I can imagine is lots of... "You want to do what ? With my WHAT ?" I love ReDeath quotes.

[]: Post by Justacrazyguy » Sat Apr 27, 2013 5:35 am Shinji would post only in the FML thread.

[]: Post by Katana » Sat Apr 27, 2013 5:38 am Asuka would slap everyone.

[]: Post by Justacrazyguy » Sat Apr 27, 2013 5:41 am Katana wrote: Asuka would slap everyone.

[]: Post by lastcody » Sat Apr 27, 2013 6:06 am Misato would post fan service

[]: Post by Katana » Sat Apr 27, 2013 6:07 am Eh ehm... I meant through your monitor, silly!

[]: Post by Jayfive » Sat Apr 27, 2013 7:06 am Mari would be constantly flirting. Ritsuko would quickly end up as a mod

[]: Post by Justacrazyguy » Sat Apr 27, 2013 7:07 am Katana wrote: Eh ehm... I meant through your monitor, silly!

[]: Post by Katana » Sat Apr 27, 2013 7:17 am Oooooooooooooooooooooooooooooo­oooooooooooooooooooooooooooooo­oooooohhhhhhhh,﻿ that explains it.

[]: Post by Dream » Sat Apr 27, 2013 7:23 am Good thread. I believe Shinji would hang around mostly in off-topic and, yes, post a lot in the FML thread, probably occasionally trying to help other people with their FMLs. I imagine that a lot of people would... If not hate him, then be pretty irritated by him, he'd probably be pretty scared of staff. I do wonder how he would feel about Shinchan's pictures though.

[]: Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat Apr 27, 2013 7:51 am Dream wrote: I do wonder how he would feel about Shinchan's pictures though.

[]: Post by Reichu » Sat Apr 27, 2013 9:31 am Rei would lurk. Kensuke would hang out in Discussion and the gun thread. He's probably start threads for all of his otaku interests, as well, then complain when they don't get enough participation. Oh, and lots of conspiracy theories. That would get old quick. Toji would at first barely be able to figure out how the forum works, and make scarcely literate posts in the most random places. Eventually we'd get a bunch of jock threads out of him, and he'd regularly sabotage conversations to inject his strong sense of proper gender roles. Also, any conversation that's picking on Asuka, he is totally in on. Hikari would inject a strong sense of moral justice and self-righteousness into everything, and also post a lot about cooking and other domestic arts. She'd alternate between being adorably sweet and being an argumentative bitch you wouldn't want to mess with. Would regularly backseat mod. Hyuga would spend a lot of time in Anime and Manga, and also say flattering things about Misato every chance he has. Aoba would join Kensuke in the gun thread, and also participate heavily in music threads. He'd regularly lament how his music career never quite took off. Maya would post regularly in the "reading" thread. She'd adamantly deny any attraction to her sempai. She would defend gay rights in the appropriate thread. But her? No, she's not gay, stop asking!

Article: Eva Characters on Evageeks
 Reichu » Sat Apr 27, 2013 9:31 am Rei would lurk. Kensuke would hang out in Discussion and the gun thread. He's probably start threads for all of his otaku interests, as well, then complain when they don't get enough participation. Oh, and lots of conspiracy theories. That would get old quick. Toji would at first barely be able to figure out how the forum works, and make scarcely literate posts in the most random places. Eventually we'd get a bunch of jock threads out of him, and he'd regularly sabotage conversations to inject his strong sense of proper gender roles. Also, any conversation that's picking on Asuka, he is totally in on. Hikari would inject a strong sense of moral justice and self-righteousness into everything, and also post a lot about cooking and other domestic arts. She'd alternate between being adorably sweet and being an argumentative bitch you wouldn't want to mess with. Would regularly backseat mod. Hyuga would spend a lot of time in Anime and Manga, and also say flattering things about Misato every chance he has. Aoba would join Kensuke in the gun thread, and also participate heavily in music threads. He'd regularly lament how his music career never quite took off. Maya would post regularly in the "reading" thread. She'd adamantly deny any attraction to her sempai. She would defend gay rights in the appropriate thread. But her? No, she's not gay, stop asking!
